notes: First-pass screening rules only. These checks identify obvious fit, failures, and missing diligence facts; issuing agencies and qualified advisors remain authoritative.

ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.label: Georgia project location
ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.fail_message: Georgia job tax credits require a Georgia project location.
ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.label: Job creation threshold
ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.pass_message: Job creation clears the catalog screening threshold.
ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.fail_message: Job creation may be too low for this Georgia credit screen.

ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.label: County tier or zone
ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.pass_message: County tier or zone was provided for Georgia diligence.
ga-job-and-quality-jobs-tax-credits.unknown_message: County tier or special-zone status must be confirmed before estimating credit value.

ga-quick-start.label: Georgia training location
ga-quick-start.fail_message: Georgia Quick Start applies to Georgia projects.
ga-quick-start.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

ga-quick-start.label: Training need
ga-quick-start.unknown_message: Training roles, skills, and hiring waves must be defined with Quick Start.

ga-reba-onegeorgia-local-support.label: Material job creation
ga-reba-onegeorgia-local-support.pass_message: Job creation is material enough for discretionary-review diligence.
ga-reba-onegeorgia-local-support.fail_message: Low job creation may weaken fit for Georgia discretionary project finance.

ga-reba-onegeorgia-local-support.label: Local support or match
ga-reba-onegeorgia-local-support.unknown_message: Local participation and public infrastructure need should be confirmed.

nc-jdig.label: North Carolina project location
nc-jdig.pass_message: Project location is in North Carolina.
nc-jdig.fail_message: JDIG applies to North Carolina projects.
nc-jdig.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

nc-jdig.label: Competitive job creation
nc-jdig.pass_message: Job creation clears the GrantStack JDIG screening threshold.
nc-jdig.fail_message: Job creation may be too low for JDIG unless special project facts apply.

nc-jdig.label: Competitive location decision
nc-jdig.unknown_message: JDIG diligence should confirm whether incentives are needed to influence a competitive location decision.

nc-jdig.label: Average wage context
nc-jdig.pass_message: Average wage was provided for county-wage diligence.
nc-jdig.unknown_message: Average wage and county comparison must be confirmed.

nc-one-nc-fund.label: North Carolina project location
nc-one-nc-fund.pass_message: Project location is in North Carolina.
nc-one-nc-fund.fail_message: OneNC applies to North Carolina projects.
nc-one-nc-fund.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

nc-one-nc-fund.label: Local participation
nc-one-nc-fund.unknown_message: OneNC diligence should confirm local participation or matching support.

nc-customized-training.label: North Carolina training location
nc-customized-training.pass_message: Project location is in North Carolina.
nc-customized-training.fail_message: North Carolina customized training applies to North Carolina projects.
nc-customized-training.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

nc-customized-training.label: Training plan
nc-customized-training.unknown_message: Training roles, skills, and delivery partner should be defined.

nc-job-ready-grants.label: New jobs for workforce support
nc-job-ready-grants.pass_message: Job creation clears the catalog screening threshold.
nc-job-ready-grants.fail_message: Job count may be too low for this workforce grant screen.

nc-job-ready-grants.label: Recruiting or talent gap
nc-job-ready-grants.unknown_message: Recruitment, talent-pipeline, or work-based-learning gap should be confirmed.

sc-job-development-credit.label: South Carolina project location
sc-job-development-credit.pass_message: Project location is in South Carolina.

sc-job-development-credit.label: County average wage diligence
sc-job-development-credit.unknown_message: County average wage comparison must be confirmed.

sc-discretionary-infrastructure-grants.label: South Carolina project location
sc-discretionary-infrastructure-grants.pass_message: Project location is in South Carolina.

sc-readysc.label: South Carolina training location
sc-readysc.pass_message: Project location is in South Carolina.

sc-readysc.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

sc-readysc.label: Training curriculum need

tn-fasttrack-economic-development-fund.fail_message: Low job creation may weaken FastTrack economic-development fit.

tx-enterprise-fund.label: Texas project location
tx-enterprise-fund.fail_message: Texas Enterprise Fund applies to Texas projects.
tx-enterprise-fund.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

tx-enterprise-fund.label: Urban job threshold screen
tx-enterprise-fund.pass_message: Projected job creation clears the urban 75-job first-pass TEF threshold.
tx-enterprise-fund.fail_message: TEF generally requires projected new job creation above 75 full-time jobs in urban areas or above 25 in rural areas.

tx-enterprise-fund.label: Out-of-state competition
tx-enterprise-fund.unknown_message: TEF requires a Texas site to be competing with at least one viable out-of-state option before a location decision.

tx-enterprise-fund.label: Average county wage diligence
tx-enterprise-fund.unknown_message: TEF diligence should confirm average wages meet or exceed the county average wage.

tx-skills-development-fund.label: Texas training location
tx-skills-development-fund.fail_message: Texas Skills Development Fund applies to Texas workforce projects.

tx-skills-development-fund.label: Eligible training partner
tx-skills-development-fund.unknown_message: Confirm an eligible public college, technical college, workforce board, TEEX, or partner applicant.

tx-enterprise-zone-program.fail_message: Texas Enterprise Zone Program applies to Texas sites.

tx-enterprise-zone-program.label: Community nomination path
tx-enterprise-zone-program.unknown_message: Enterprise Zone diligence should confirm local community nomination and qualifying employee criteria.

oh-job-creation-tax-credit.fail_message: Ohio Job Creation Tax Credit applies to Ohio projects.
oh-job-creation-tax-credit.unknown_message: State could not be confirmed from the project location.

oh-job-creation-tax-credit.pass_message: Job creation clears the published 10-job threshold.
oh-job-creation-tax-credit.fail_message: Ohio JCTC eligibility includes creating at least 10 jobs within three years.

oh-job-creation-tax-credit.label: Annual payroll diligence
oh-job-creation-tax-credit.unknown_message: Confirm created-job payroll against the current program threshold.

oh-jobsohio-revitalization-program.fail_message: JobsOhio revitalization assistance applies to Ohio sites.

alabama-jobs-act-jobs-credit.pass_message: Job creation clears the non-targeted county first-pass threshold.
alabama-jobs-act-jobs-credit.fail_message: Projects in non-targeted counties generally need 50 net new full-time jobs; targeted, jumpstart, or technology projects may use lower thresholds.

eda-public-works.label: Eligible public or nonprofit applicant
eda-public-works.pass_message: Public or nonprofit applicant context was provided.
eda-public-works.unknown_message: EDA Public Works usually requires an eligible public or nonprofit applicant, not only a private company.

eda-public-works.label: Public infrastructure need
eda-public-works.unknown_message: Document the public infrastructure gap, eligible applicant, match, and regional strategy fit.
